top_signals.title: Oil Set for Worst Month Since 2020 as US, Iran to Extend Truce
top_signals.summary: Oil edged lower after the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days, potentially allowing shipments through the Strait of Hormuz to resume.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jefferson, Global Economic Developments and the U.S. Economy
top_signals.summary: Speech At the 2026 Bank of Japan-Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies Conference, Tokyo, Japan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Anthropic confirms Claude Mythos-class models will roll out to the public
top_signals.summary: Anthropic has confirmed that it plans to bring Mythos-class models to the general public after delaying the rollout due to security risks to public and private software. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
